productDisplayName: Redtape Men Calcullas Black Casual Shoes
description: Cut a dash with this high top pair of ankle boots for the cosmopolitan male from red tape. Styled in sophisticated leather, wear them with stone washed denims, a casual plaid shirt and a stylish hide jacket. Upper High quality leather upper for protection, comfort and durability Pointed toe box for style Buckle detailing on the lateral side of the foot Zipper closure on the inner side of the foot for a customised Fit Padded mesh lining for greater comfort Midsole TPR midsole for durability Outsole TPR outsole with a wooden heel Rubber sole for the heel nailed to the heel for durability shoe care Use a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
